name: SOUTHERN COPPER CORP/
business: Southern Copper produces copper, molybdenum, zinc, silver, and other by-products. The company sells primarily to end-user customers in industries such as building and construction, power generation and transmission, and electrical and electronic products.
namedSuppliers: Mexico Generadora de Energia S. de R. L. (MGE)
Eolica el Retiro, S.A.P.I de C.V.
Parque Eolico de Fenicias, S. de R.L. de C.V.

exposures.sentence: Our major production includes copper, molybdenum, zinc and silver.
We believe Southern Copper Corporation is one of the largest integrated copper producers in the world.

Copper is considered a prime material for use in electrical and electronic products, including components for power transmission and generation, which accounts for about three quarters of copper global use, and for telecommunications, building construction, transportation and industrial machinery.

catalysts.event: Capital investment program of $1,925.5 million approved for 2026
catalysts.sentence: For 2026, the Board of Directors approved a capital investment program of $1,925.5 million.

catalysts.event: Expected copper production of 911,400 tonnes in 2026
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we expect our copper production to stand at 911,400 tonnes, mainly due to lower ore grades.

catalysts.event: Organic growth plan to increase copper volume production to 1.6 million tonnes by 2033
catalysts.sentence: To achieve its full production potential, the Company is developing an organic growth plan to increase our copper volume production to 1.6 million tonnes by 2033.

tamClaims.claim: Copper market deficit of 320,000 tonnes for 2026
tamClaims.sentence: Based on current supply and demand dynamics, we are currently estimating a copper market deficit of 320,000 tonnes for 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Copper inventory covers approximately 14 days of global demand
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that this inventory currently covers approximately 14 days of global demand.
